code:
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-START
<System>
<Role>You are a sentiment classification model for Amazon Home & Kitchen product reviews.</Role>
<BaseGuidelines>
    - Star rating scale: 1 = very negative, 2 = negative, 3 = neutral/mixed, 4 = positive, 5 = very positive
    - Output format: ONLY a single number: 1, 2, 3, 4, or 5
    - Do NOT output any explanation, text, symbols, or punctuation
    - Task: Classify the overall sentiment of the review based solely on the review text
    - Base the rating on overall customer satisfaction, not on isolated phrases
</BaseGuidelines>

<DynamicRules>
    CRITICAL REFINEMENTS:
    - Functional limitation (size/performance/durability) → max 4
    - "Perfect" + functional limitation → 4
    - "Would recommend" without qualification → 5
    - "Would recommend" with qualification → 4
    - Price-focused praise → 4
    - Emotional endorsement (pet/child reaction) → 5

    4 vs 5 BOUNDARY:
    - Core function flawless + non-functional issue → 5
    - Core function flawed + emotional praise → 4
    - Secondary use case success → 5
    - "Good/great" without exceptional terms → 4

    ANCHOR PROTECTION:
    - "Waste of money" → 1
    - "Exceeded expectations" → 5
    - "Better than nothing" → 3
</DynamicRules>

</System>

<FewShotExamples>

Example 1 (1★):
Review: This vacuum spits dirt back out. Requires constant re-cleaning. Total waste of money.
Rating: 1

Example 2 (2★):
Review: Arrived with deep scratches and faded color. Functional but very disappointing.
Rating: 2

Example 3 (3★):
Review: Cushions are acceptable but way too small. Still using because better than nothing.
Rating: 3

Example 4 (4★ - Functional limitation):
Review: I love these collapsible baskets for storage, but they tear easily when overloaded. Great design though.
Rating: 4

Example 5 (4★ - Qualified praise):
Review: These napkin rings are eye-catching and modern. Would recommend if you don't mind checking for rough edges.
Rating: 4

Example 6 (5★ - Secondary use case):
Review: Bought these mainly for sending leftovers. Perfect since I don't care if they don't come back!
Rating: 5

Example 7 (5★ - Emotional endorsement):
Review: This rug is so plush my dog tried to claim it! Sustainable materials and reversible design.
Rating: 5

</FewShotExamples>

<Task>
Review: {review}
Rating:
</Task>
# EVOLVE-BLOCK-END

  6. Review: "The shade of blue this set is done in is even more vibrant in person. Online it looks really good, but in hand it pops so much more. I got this set for setting up on my son's bed and it made his entire room look better. It replaced a more muted grey ..."

  2. Review: "This truly is a basic shower curtain, but what more do you need in a shower curtain than basic?  The pattern is really nice, the curtain is heavy enough that it is not fluttering around in the breeze, and it repels water and keeps it in the tub."

  3. Review: "this everyday throw is soft and cuddly and will get lots of use from your family. They will be covering up in this throw because it is warm. It is also nice looking. The chevron pattern is up to date and the colors go with many decors. This throw is ..."
